content: Just as 2025's configurable Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) drives swarm UAV autonomous agents to explore and seek novel, unknown targets through intrinsic reward, biological pathogenic agents (a definition of agent from biology) are 'naturally selected intrinsic agents' driven by the intrinsic curiosity-like drive of mutating to explore novel host niches to survive and reproduce. This framing lets researchers adapt ICM-based reinforcement learning frameworks to model pathogen evolutionary exploration dynamics.
